channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sandra Bullock Helped Demonstrate One of the First Online Movie Ticket Purchases in 1995
item.description: In 1995, actress Sandra Bullock participated in what became an important early moment in the history of online commerce when she purchased movie tickets over the internet to promote her thriller film ...

item.title: Githurai residents recover missing baby after suspect reveals location
item.description: Residents of Githurai 45 in Nairobi were left shaken after a two-year-old child went missing following a suspected abduction captured on CCTV footage. The video, which went viral, showed a young girl ...

item.title: UN raises concern over rising food insecurity and malnutrition affecting millions of Nigerians
item.description: The United Nations don raise serious concern over the growing food insecurity situation for Nigeria, warning say about 35 million people fit face acute hunger between June and August 2026. According t...

item.title: Ebola treatment centres attacked in eastern DR Congo as patients flee amid unrest
item.description: Health authorities in the Democratic Republic of Congo are dealing with a worsening Ebola outbreak after two treatment facilities in the eastern Ituri province were attacked within the space of a week...

item.title: Canadian government spending on King Charles III’s 2025 throne speech visit estimated at nearly $900,000
item.description: The article reports that the estimated cost of bringing King Charles III to Canada to deliver the Speech from the Throne in the Senate chamber was close to $900,000. The visit, which took place at the...

item.title: Tanzania strengthens position as leading honey exporter in East Africa with rising production and revenue
item.description: Tanzania has emerged as the leading honey producer in the East African Community and second in the Southern African Development Community, showing strong growth in its beekeeping industry. The sector ...

item.title: Ferrari and IBM expand AI-powered fan engagement through personalized Formula 1 app experiences
item.description: Ferrari and IBM have partnered to improve fan engagement in Formula One by redesigning Ferrari’s fan application with artificial intelligence-powered features and personalized content. IBM, which has ...

item.title: Five including two CRDB employees arraigned in Kisutu court over alleged theft from deceased customer’s account
item.description: Five people, among them two employees of CRDB Bank, have been taken to the Kisutu Resident Magistrate’s Court facing several charges linked to the alleged theft of 58,000 US dollars from the bank acco...

item.title: A 1909 Lewis Hine Photograph of Mrs. S.J. Bonner and Her Sons Working in a Georgia Textile Mill
item.description: The article presents a historical photograph taken in 1909 by documentary photographer Lewis Hine in Macon, Georgia, as part of his work for the National Child Labor Committee. The image shows Mrs. S....

item.title: Troy Cassar-Daley supports winter vaccination campaign urging First Nations Australians to get protected
item.description: As winter approaches in Australia, health authorities are warning of a rise in respiratory illnesses, including influenza, COVID-19, and respiratory syncytial virus (RSV). After recording the highest ...

item.title: New Climate Projections Suggest Extreme Warming May Be Avoided, but Paris Targets Are Likely Out of Reach
item.description: New climate research suggests that the most catastrophic warming scenarios once widely discussed by scientists are becoming less likely, mainly because renewable energy adoption has accelerated and de...

item.title: Orlando Pirates secure Betway Premiership title after Orbit College own goals in final match
item.description: Orlando Pirates ended a 14-year wait for a domestic league title in dramatic fashion after defeating Orbit College 2-0 at a packed Mbombela Stadium to clinch the Betway Premiership crown. The match wa...

item.title: Phil Collins rules out Rock Hall performance but leaves door open to future touring
item.description: Phil Collins has confirmed that he will not perform at his upcoming Rock and Roll Hall of Fame induction ceremony, citing the need to be in suitable physical condition for live performance. Speaking i...

item.title: Donny Pangilinan appears on 'Everybody Sing' with Vice Ganda and Songbayanan Virtual Assistants
item.description: Actor and television personality Donny Pangilinan joined the popular ABS-CBN musical game show 'Everybody Sing', bringing additional energy and excitement to the program. The episode featured a specia...

item.title: Matt Corby reflects on grief, life and a magpie-inspired moment on new album Tragic Magic
item.description: Australian singer-songwriter Matt Corby has spoken about the deeply personal experiences that shaped his latest album, Tragic Magic, as he prepares to tour Perth. The record, which features 13 tracks,...

item.title: Supreme Court takes suo motu cognisance of Twisha Sharma death case amid allegations of investigation lapses
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has decided to hear a suo motu case related to the unnatural death of 32-year-old actor-model Twisha Sharma, who was found dead at her matrimonial home in Bhopal on May 12, ...

item.title: Shell Nigeria Gas, MAN and Rivers State Partner to Expand Industrial Gas Infrastructure
item.description: Shell Nigeria Gas Limited (SNG) and the Manufacturers Association of Nigeria (MAN) don show strong support for efforts to expand gas supply infrastructure across Rivers State in order to improve energ...

item.title: DCI establishes specialised investigative team to address rising femicide cases in Kenya
item.description: The National Police Service (NPS) in Kenya has raised serious concern over the increasing cases of Sexual and Gender-Based Violence (SGBV), particularly femicide, which continues to affect women and g...

item.title: Mpumi Khoza praises youth development after Orlando Pirates secure historic domestic treble
item.description: Orlando Pirates have capped off a remarkable season by winning the Betway Premiership title and completing a historic domestic treble. The Soweto giants defeated Orbit College 2–0 in their final leagu...

item.title: Expert warns Trump risks escalation in potential military action against Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump is reportedly considering a significant escalation in U.S. military actions against Iran, including the possibility of launching a new wave of strikes that could effectively end...
